name: SDXL txt2img + 2 LoRAs → ComfyUI
description: Standard ComfyUI workflow with SDXL and two LoRAs
input: 帮我生成一个 SDXL 文生图工作流，加两个 LoRA：add_detail 权重0.8，epiNoiseoffset 权重0.6。平台 ComfyUI。提示词：a beautiful landscape, masterpiece

name: Flux.1-dev + ControlNet depth → ComfyUI
description: Flux workflow with ControlNet, must enforce no negative prompt
input: Flux.1-dev with ControlNet depth for ComfyUI. Prompt: 'a cyberpunk city at night'. Generate workflow.

name: SD1.5 inpaint → ComfyUI
input: SD1.5 inpaint workflow for ComfyUI. Input image: photo.png, mask: mask.png. Prompt: 'restore old photo'

name: SD1.5 simples → A1111 params
description: Simple A1111 params with LoRA embedding in prompt
input: Generate A1111 params for SD1.5 txt2img with LoRA 'add_detail' weight 0.7. Prompt: 'a cat sitting on a chair'

name: Flux schnell → A1111 Forge
description: Flux schnell on Forge with no negative prompt
input: A1111 Forge workflow with Flux schnell. Prompt: 'a futuristic robot'. Steps: 4

name: SDXL → Diffusers pipeline.py
description: Generate Diffusers Python script for SDXL
input: Generate Diffusers pipeline.py for SDXL. Prompt: 'a red sports car on a mountain road'

name: SD3 → Replicate API
input: Generate a Replicate API request for SD3.5 large. Prompt: 'an astronaut riding a horse on Mars'

name: SDXL → Midjourney prompt
description: Cross-platform: SDXL workflow specs → Midjourney /imagine prompt
input: Convert this SDXL workflow to a Midjourney prompt: 1024x1024, 25 steps, cfg 7, dpmpp_2m karras. Subject: 'a serene mountain lake at sunrise'

name: Video workflow → ComfyUI
input: AnimateDiff txt2vid workflow for ComfyUI. Model: SD1.5, motion module: mm_sd_v15_v2. Prompt: 'fire burning in a fireplace'

name: Flux → Stability AI API
description: Stability AI API request for SD3 Ultra (Flux not available on Stability API, should fall back)
input: Generate Stability AI API request. Model: SD3 Ultra. Prompt: 'a glass orb containing a galaxy'. Aspect ratio: 16:9

name: Multi-ControlNet chain → ComfyUI
description: SDXL with OpenPose + Canny ControlNets, chained correctly
input: SDXL with OpenPose and Canny ControlNets for ComfyUI. Prompt: 'a dancer in motion'

name: SDXL with Refiner → Diffusers
input: Diffusers pipeline for SDXL with refiner. Base+refiner two-pass. Prompt: 'hyperrealistic portrait of an elderly man'
